summary:
CIN I correlates with low-grade squamous intraepithelial lesion (LSIL), which typically regresses spontaneously in young, immunocompetent women and requires no immediate treatment. Management involves routine follow-up with repeat Pap smear and HPV testing in one year, avoiding invasive procedures such as cryotherapy, LEEP, or hysterectomy.  

$\boxed{A}$
